summary: POI Location Accuracy backend testing complete. All 17 tests passed (100%). HERE Browse and Discover APIs working correctly. Combined POI fetch returns 236 items (was 99 before fix). Deduplication, type classification, and position/distance fields all verified.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: GET /api/browse returns 100 truck-relevant POIs with position (lat/lng) and distance fields
VERIFIED: POST /api/discover returns accurate truck stop results (19 results for 'truck stop' query)
VERIFIED: POST /api/discover returns accurate Love's Travel Stop results (7 results with correct positions)
VERIFIED: POST /api/discover returns accurate Cat Scale results (9 results with category 700-7900-0132)
VERIFIED: POST /api/discover returns Pilot Flying J results (1 result)
VERIFIED: Combined Browse+Discover returns 236 total POIs (before deduplication) - significantly more than previous 99
VERIFIED: Deduplication by position works correctly (119 -> 107 after dedup in test)
VERIFIED: Type classification correct: Love's -> major_chains, Cat Scale -> service, Rest Area -> rest_area, Walmart -> distribution
VERIFIED: Discover API uses radius restriction (in=circle:lat,lon;r=radius) correctly
VERIFIED: All POI items have position.lat, position.lng, and distance fields

discover_api.test_discover_loves_travel_stop: PASS - 7 results with Love's in title

combined_poi_fetch.test_combined_poi_count: PASS - 236 total items (Browse general: 100, Browse service: 100, Discover truck stop: 19, Discover Love's: 7, Discover Pilot: 1, Discover Cat Scale: 9)
